finding: The sample-window causal benchmark names ML_mlp on early_tail as the onset-window winner. The all-samples reference diagnostic is excluded from this production ranking; its best row is ML_mlp. The best transparent template rule has artificial-clip res68 0.1071 and natural coverage 0.0137; the best ML/NN alternative has res68 0.0186 and coverage 0.6243. The decisive constraint is not only amplitude recovery: methods with nonzero lift must also keep q_template shift, timing-tail delta, and charge-bias delta inside the preregistered side-effect gates.
title: saturation onset sample-window causal veto
